selection_policy: Use daily GitHub Trending as a fresh, external beta corpus.
Prefer real application/tooling repos with parsable source over markdown-only lists.
Avoid security/hacking repos and repos that are primarily prompt/skill collections for the default beta corpus.
Vendor as local shallow clones under vendor/github-repos; do not commit cloned repositories.

repos.reason: Code-intelligence application; directly exercises graph and multimodal claims.
Large production analytics app; good stress test for Python backend/domain structure.
Compiler/toolchain repo; strong structural signal despite lower daily star count.
Computer-use agent infrastructure; useful for agent/runtime architecture questions.
Agent memory/tooling repo with compact Go structure.
High-momentum Python CLI/tooling repo; default-disabled until reviewed for policy and quality fit.
Very high momentum, but mostly agent skill/prompt material rather than source-architecture corpus.
Codex-adjacent repo; useful as optional agent-tooling content, not a default architecture target.
